content.text: I'll start by investigating the current state of the elasticsearch namespace.

input.command: kubectl get ns elasticsearch 2>&1; echo "---"; kubectl -n elasticsearch get all 2>&1

input.command:
for s in search-http search-alt search-direct; do echo "=== $s ==="; kubectl -n elasticsearch get svc $s -o jsonpath='{.spec.selector}{"\n"}'; done
echo "=== log-reader env ==="
kubectl -n elasticsearch get deploy log-reader -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].env}{"\n"}'
echo "=== es-alpha pod labels ==="
kubectl -n elasticsearch get pod es-alpha-0 --show-labels
kubectl -n elasticsearch get pod es-beta-0 --show-labels
